description: Diagnose and fix a deadlock in the FinancialSystem project where the 'DeadlockDemo' simulation hangs indefinitely due to a threading issue in 'TransferService.java'. Identify the two stuck threads and record their names in 'FinancialSystem/analysis.txt'. Modify 'src/main/java/com/financial/core/TransferService.java' to prevent the deadlock by implementing a resource ordering strategy. The task is complete when 'DeadlockDemo' successfully prints 'SIMULATION COMPLETED' and exits.
